commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=56bb624473adf1ade6954f8605015104d7922a2f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes llm-core plain JSON-schema union coercion and bundle-MCP tool dispatch so schema-nullable nulls are preserved while other top-level null MCP arguments are omitted, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +91, Tests +114. Total +205 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this review. Source inspection and the canonical reporter evidence make the null-to-empty-string path source-reproducible, but the raw wire payload and real awslabs EKS MCP run remain unverified here.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are contributor real-path proof, one schema-compatibility repair, and a maintainer choice of canonical PR.

target.title: fix(agents): strip null-valued optional args from MCP tool calls
